name: Green Beans and Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound Green Beans, Cut in pieces
4 Small New Red Potatoes, Cut in 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine water, green beans, potatoes, and 1 teaspoon of salt. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until vegetables are tender.
3. Drain the vegetables briefly in cold water to stop the cooking process.
4. Cover and set aside.
5. In a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook bacon and onion until the bacon is crisp and the onion is tender.
6. Drain off all but 1 tablespoon of bacon drippings.
7. Add beans and potatoes to the skillet and toss until well coated with bacon and onion mixture.
8. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt and pepper.
